name: auto-retry-plugin
description: Automatic recovery of Antigravity chat agent

autoRetry.pollInterval.description: Polling interval in seconds to search for errors in the agent.

autoRetry.cdpHost.description: Host address for the Chrome DevTools Protocol.

autoRetry.cdpPort.description: Port number for the Chrome DevTools Protocol.

autoRetry.undoThresholdSeconds.description: Time threshold (in seconds) to perform Undo. If error time <= threshold, Undo is performed. If 0, Undo is never performed.
